name: argocd
description: Expert guide for Argo CD GitOps on Kubernetes: install and upgrade, Application/AppProject/ApplicationSet resources, Helm/Kustomize workflows, RBAC/SSO security, operations, HA, and troubleshooting.

interface.shortDescription: Argo CD GitOps guidance for Kubernetes
interface.longDescription: Use Argo CD to plan, install, secure, operate, upgrade, and troubleshoot Argo CD GitOps workflows on Kubernetes with focused operational checks and official documentation references.
defaultPrompt: Use Argo CD to audit this GitOps application.
Use Argo CD to troubleshoot this sync or health failure.
Use Argo CD to design a secure multi-cluster deployment plan.
